request.message: I need access to SAP for the new finance project. My employee ID is CG-4821.

response.text: I have submitted your access request for SAP. Reference: ACC-1A2B3D.

request.message: What is the policy for sick leave? Also, apply for my sick leave from tomorrow for 2 days. My ID is CG-1234.

response.text:
Employees are granted 12 days of paid sick leave annually.

I have also initiated a leave request for you: Leave Request LV-9F8E7D.

request.message: This is ridiculous! I've been waiting for my laptop replacement for 3 weeks and no one is helping me! I am very angry.

response.text: I apologize that I couldn't resolve your issue. I am connecting you with a human agent immediately.

request.message: Can you check the status of my invoice submission from last week?

response.text: All vendor invoices must be submitted centrally through the 'MyFinance' portal under the 'Accounts Payable' section. Invoices submitted without a valid PO will be auto-rejected unless they fall under the pre-approved exceptional categories.

request.message: Mera password reset kar do please, system ka naam Workday hai. Employee ID CG-5678.

response.text: Password reset instructions for Workday have been sent to your email. Ref: RST-8X7Y6Z.
